spread_slippage_summary.basis: Independent local OANDA S5 bid/ask candles from the live worktree replay history. SHORT/DOWN LIMIT entry is checked on bid touch and attached TAKE_PROFIT_ORDER exit is checked on ask touch.
spread_slippage_summary.touch_lag_note: The replay treats the recorded entry timestamp as the LIMIT arming/reference time and requires an S5 entry touch followed by an S5 TP touch. The exact recorded fill/close timestamp candle often misses by one or more S5 bars, so touch times are retained in sample_replay_details instead of hidden.

timestamp_alignment.interpretation: Positive touch-order replay is usable as read-only evidence, but generated proof import should preserve the fill/touch lag and should not claim exact same-candle S5 fill reconstruction.

ledger_full_price_cross_check.interpretation: Canonical OANDA transaction fullPrice confirms the live-worktree execution-ledger sample is bid/ask cost-inclusive even though local S5 candle aggregation touches the level a few seconds later.

proof_queue_blockers_if_positive.evidence: Only 4 exact LIMIT_ORDER / ATTACHED_TECHNICAL_TP / HARVEST samples are replayed. The broader 20/0 proof floor includes MARKET and STOP vehicles and is not used here.

Broad TP proof reconciliation has been applied in payoff_shape_diagnosis, but the exact LIMIT replay still includes legacy rows 469278/469427/469898 that need exact execution-ledger/fill reconciliation before live-grade proof import.
The S5 replay passes by touch order, but strict same-candle fill/TP timestamp touch count is 0. Proof import must preserve this lag and cross-check transaction fullPrice where available.

harvest/operator artifacts still report current blockers including RANGE_FORECAST_REQUIRES_RANGE_ROTATION, OPERATOR_MANUAL_SAME_THEME_ADD_BLOCKED, SELF_IMPROVEMENT_FORECAST_ADVERSE_PATH, and GUARDIAN_RECEIPT_OPERATOR_REVIEW_REQUIRED.
data/as_proof_pack_queue.json now has queue_count=2 and includes the target LIMIT lane as EVIDENCE_GAP / can_enter_proof_pack=true, but proof_ready_count=0 and can_create_live_permission_count=0.

negative_replay_no_scout_conditions: Return the LIMIT vehicle to NO_SCOUT / NO_TRADE if a refreshed exact LIMIT/HARVEST S5 bid/ask replay has net_expectancy_after_bidask <= 0.
Return the LIMIT vehicle to NO_SCOUT / NO_TRADE if exact replay losses appear and the win/loss mix no longer clears positive expectancy after bid/ask and slippage.
Return the LIMIT vehicle to NO_SCOUT / NO_TRADE if a month-scale replay for the same exact LIMIT/HARVEST vehicle is negative or contradicts these 4 sample results.
Return the LIMIT vehicle to NO_SCOUT / NO_TRADE if the bid/ask path cannot prove entry touch followed by TP touch without using MARKET, STOP, or market-close outcomes.

Replay passed by entry-touch then TP-touch sequence, but exact fill/TP timestamp candles did not themselves touch the levels; generated proof must not claim same-candle S5 fill reconstruction.
